aiAgent:
export const shopAssistant = pikkuAIAgent({
  name: 'shop-assistant',
  description:
    'Helps customers browse the catalogue and manage their basket.',
  goal: 'Help users find products, manage their basket, and answer questions about shop items.',
  model: 'openai/gpt-4o-mini',
  tools: [
    listCategories,
    listItems,
    getItem,
    getBasket,
    addToBasket,
    removeFromBasket,
  ],
  memory: { storage: 'aiStorage', lastMessages: 20 },
  maxSteps: 10,
});
cliSubcommands: // commands: { report: dailySalesReport, cleanup: cleanupAbandonedBaskets, items: listItems }
